{{Quote|Well, well—I do believe it's an old friend of yours, Karrde. The Kern's Pride; the slightly less-than-honorable Samuel Tomas Gillespee, proprietor.|[[Aves]] to [[Talon Karrde]]|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Kern's Pride''''', a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], was the flagship of the smuggler [[Samuel Tomas Gillespee]].

==Characteristics==
While it was the oldest and most battered ship he owned, Gillespee refused to command any other ship. The ''Kern's Pride'' was armed with six double [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] and two [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], and had a cargo capacity of 10,000 metric tons.

[[File:KernsPride-Gamer4.jpg|thumb|left|150px|''Kern's Pride'' deckplan.]]

==History==
When Gillespee attempted to retire on [[Ukio/Legends|Ukio]], he kept the ''Kern's Pride'' with him, and later used it to escape the planet during [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Battle at Ukio|assault]].

Gillespee and his ship were later [[Skirmish at Chazwa|pursued]] by a pair of [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigates]] in the [[Chazwa system/Legends|Chazwa system]], but he managed to escape with the assistance of [[Talon Karrde]] and the ''[[Wild Karrde]]''.

{{Ship-stub}}
